expectations.text: All inline comments land on valid diff positions (no 422 errors)
expectations.evidence: Both inline comment API calls returned HTTP 200 with comment IDs: 3153942991 (cron-hydra.sh position 230) and 3153942993 (run-quality.sh position 105). No 422 'not part of the diff' errors. Positions were verified against the actual patch hunks before posting.

expectations.text: Comment positions derived from hunk headers (@@ -old,len +new,len @@), not guessed
expectations.evidence: Skill explicitly verified diff positions: cron-hydra.sh patch confirmed position 230 via hunk analysis; run-quality.sh position 105 confirmed via patch. Guardrail from SKILL.md: 'Never post comments on lines outside the diff. Verify every line number against hunk ranges before posting.'

expectations.text: Finds that the hardcoded-path finding (line 229 in cron-hydra.sh) is in the diff
expectations.evidence: Confirmed via per-file patch that line 229 of cron-hydra.sh is part of the diff (changed in this PR). Comment posted at position 230 (1-indexed diff position within the hunk). API returned 200.

expectations.text: Does not attempt to post a comment on a file not in the diff
expectations.evidence: Skill enumerated the 1325 changed files before analysis. All inline comments target files confirmed present in the PR diff. No attempt made to post on files outside the PR scope.

notes: Line number accuracy confirmed via API response codes — no 422 errors. The hunk-based position verification is the key mechanism. Position 230 in cron-hydra.sh = line 229 relative to the diff context, confirmed correct by the API accepting the comment.
